Code: 661038
💏[MCM] New Original Quality Fursten Waist Bag
The Fursten waist bag is made of our iconic Visetos print coated canvas and outlined with a 🏯 pyramid, blending fashion and function 🎼. Wear it at the waist or slung over the shoulder to create a modern street style.
❤️Size: 36*20*12
